event.title: ACITY in London, United Kingdom, United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

body.p: 14th International Conference on Advances in Computing and Information Technology (ACITY 2024) will provide an excellent international forum for sharing knowledge and results in theory, methodology and applications of Computing and Information Technology. The conference focuses on all technical and practical aspects of high performance computing, green computing, pervasive computing, cloud computing etc.

tags.tag: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
